title: HCT - Hexandcube's Client Tweaks
description: Vanilla Minecraft with client-side QoL improvements
body:
# Hexandcube's Client Tweaks
### Vanilla Minecraft with quality of life improvements that work on multiplayer servers.

Report issues and suggestions here: [https://github.com/hexandcube/hexandcube-client-tweaks/issues](https://github.com/hexandcube/hexandcube-client-tweaks/issues)

Changelogs for versions before 5.2 are still quite messy, I'm working on it.

#### Improvements include:

- Nicer GUI
- Saturation and hunger HUD
- Shulkerbox Tooltips
- Map Tooltips
- Item Stitching fix
- Minimap with waypoints
- Crafting and inventory tweaks
- Sound Muffler
- Light Overlay (F7)
- Comparing equipment
- 3D skin layers
- Enchantment descriptions
- Dynamic lighting
- Performance improvements
- Custom shader support
- Inventory sorting
- Optifine and MinecraftCapes.net Cape support
- and more


#### Hotkeys (for latest version)

- `H+C` - Configure MiniHUD
- `X+C` - Configure Tweakeroo
- `M` - Open World Map
- `H` - Toggle MiniHUD
- `N` - Open Notepad
- `O` - Change Shader Pack Menu
- `R` - Slot Swapping menu
- `U` - Manage Waypoints
- `B` - New Waypoint
- `Y` - Minimap Settings
- `J` - Toggle Minimap
- `]` - World Map Settings
- `Z` - Zoom
- `F7` - Lighty Mode Switcher
- `F8` - Lighty Light overlay
- `=` - Open ClientSort Editor
- `I` - Toggle "Do a Barrel Roll" elytra movement
- `CTRL+O` on inventory screen - Toggle REI
- `R` on inventory item hover - Show recipe
- `u` on inventory item hover - Show uses

Check version description for version-specific hotkeys

<details>
<summary>Version list</summary>

IMPORTANT:
Legacy versions 1.0, 1.1, 3.0, 3.1, 3.2, 4.2 beta and 4.2 are unavailable on Modrinth due to the licenses of some of the mods used in those versions. If you want to install those versions, you can still get them from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/hexandcubes-client-tweaks) and [my website](https://hexandcube.com/projects/hexandcubesclienttweaks). Since 4.3, all future versions will be released on Modrinth.

⚠️ - Version has a critical issue which might make the game unplayable (check issue details)

🕸️ - Legacy version unavailable on modrinth

🧪 - Pre-release version

---
 
**Disclaimer:** While this modpack was designed to be used on vanilla multiplayer servers, always make sure that the server you're playing on, allows mods included in this pack. Playing on public servers like Hypixel with this modpack is not recommended and may result in a ban.

Hexandcube is not responsible for any bans caused by the player's ignorance.
